name: Celonis
description: Process mining and execution management platform with APIs/SDKs for process intelligence.

seo.title: Celonis — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Celonis: Process mining and execution management platform with APIs/SDKs for process intelligence.

when_to_use: Process mining to find hidden inefficiencies in CI/CD flows
Visualize end-to-end delivery processes from event logs
Benchmark software delivery against industry patterns
SDK integration for custom process intelligence apps

pros: Market leader in process mining with rich connectors
APIs and SDKs for embedding process intelligence
Uncovers hidden ROI in operational workflows
Strong SAP and enterprise ERP integrations
cons: Not really observability in the DevOps sense
Steep learning curve and requires consultants
review.verdict: Category-defining process mining platform, but misfiled as DevOps observability; fits business ops better.
review.best_for: Enterprise BizOps and finance teams mining SAP or Salesforce process data.
review.not_for: Engineering teams looking for traces, metrics or logs observability.
